name: Pumpkin Harvest Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 300°F.
2. Beat together the butter and brown sugar until creamy.
3. Add the eggs, pumpkin, and vanilla; mix well.
4. Stir in the flour mixture and add the chopped white chocolate and pecans.
5. Drop rounded spoonfuls of dough onto ungreased cookie sheets.
6. Bake for 20 minutes or until set.
7. Allow cookies to cool completely on the baking sheet before removing.
